Inventing Radio

Listen online or archived. No ads. Thousands of stations in one app.

Coming Soon
Coming Soon

How It Works

1

Live Radio

Radioller offers a vast library of internet radio stations from around the world.

2

Smart Search

Easily search for stations by name or filter them by country, genre, or duration of available recordings.

3

Playback Control

Control playback using your Bluetooth headset, car stereo, or directly from the device.

Streaming the World

Radio is still one of the most accessible and diverse forms of media, and Radioller brings its global reach to your fingertips. The app allows users to discover and listen to live internet radio stations from across the world — anytime, anywhere.

Whether you're exploring new music genres, staying connected to your home country's broadcasts, or just enjoying curated radio from abroad, Radioller offers a seamless and enjoyable experience. Stations can be filtered by country, genre, and other attributes to help users find exactly what they're looking for.

With Bluetooth control, background playback, and a clean, user-friendly interface, Radioller fits naturally into daily life. Whether you're driving, working, or relaxing, the sound keeps going — even when your screen is off.

From expats and travelers to everyday listeners, Radioller helps people stay informed, entertained, and connected to the world — all through the simplicity of live radio.

"We created Radioller to give people more freedom in how they enjoy radio — online or offline, anytime, anywhere. It's built for those who love discovering stations from around the world, but also want the convenience of saving and controlling what they hear."

Dmytro Korolov Radioller Founder

Why Choose Us

Freedom to Listen Anywhere

Radioller ensures uninterrupted access to global radio content. Users can stream live or download audio for offline playback, making it ideal for areas with limited connectivity or high data costs.

Intelligent Discovery and Management

Our platform provides powerful tools for station discovery and organization. With smart filtering, favorites, hidden stations, and scheduled downloads, users can tailor their listening experience to their needs.

Integrated and User-Centric Control

Radioller supports seamless control via Bluetooth devices and operates efficiently in the background. Whether commuting or multitasking, users stay connected without interrupting their workflow.

Enjoy your life!
